news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
MarketVector Indexes™ Licenses the BlueStar® Robotics Index to VanEck

holdings.infoBox: IBOT is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.66%, ABB Ltd at 5.82%, Keyence at 5.35%, NVIDIA at 4.45%, and Emerson Electric Co. at 4.34%.

overview.description: The Vaneck Robotics ETF (IBOT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BlueStar Robotics index. The fund tracks an index designed to provide exposure to companies involved in early adoption of commercial and industrial robotics, globally. Stocks are selected based on the amount of revenue tied to the theme IBOT was launched on Apr 5, 2023 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: 7 Best Robotics & AI ETFs
data.text: Artificial intelligence could define this decade. These seven AI ETFs provide investors with well-rounded exposure as this technology comes into its own.

data.title: MarketVector Indexes™ Licenses the BlueStar® Robotics Index to VanEck
data.text: FRANKFURT, Germany--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MarketVector Indexes™ (“MarketVector”) announces the licensing of the BlueStar® Robotics Index (ticker: BRBT) to underlie the VanEck Robotics ETF (IBOT).

data.title: VanEck Launches Robotics ETF (IBOT)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches IBOT ETF, offers global exposure to the rise of the robotics industry, which is projected to grow to over $90 billion by 2026
